name: Awoken's Rail Spike
desc_clean: Awoken X Though reluctant at first to allow the Rail to come through the Wildwood, the Edge Priory eventually agreed with me to let it pass and uphold the Covenant with Seraph.
mechanic_summary: Awoken's Rail Spike to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken X Though reluctant at first to allow the Rail to come through the Wildwood, the Edge Priory eventually agreed with me to let it pass and uphold the Covenant with Seraph. Keywords: brak.
